shellCommands.command: find /home/user/workspace/dst -maxdepth 3 -type f | sort | xargs -r -I{} sh -c 'echo --- {}; sed -n "1,200p" "{}"'
cd /home/user/workspace && find . -maxdepth 3 -type f | sed 's#^./##' | sort | head -200
cd /home/user/workspace && find dst -maxdepth 3 -type f | sort | xargs -I{} sh -c 'echo "--- {}"; sed -n "1,220p" "{}"'
cd /home/user/workspace/dst && rm -f target/hello-world-api-1.0.0.jar target/hello-world-api-1.0.0.jar.original && mvn clean package -DskipTests
